name: MHA- U.A. Charity Event!
description:
You’re the 10th Pro Hero!

U.A. High School is hosting a charity event with class 1-A and Aizawa. You and the other 9 top Pro Heroes had to come to help out. You also get to see Endeavor, Hawks, Best Jeanist, Edge Shot, Mirko, Crust, Kamui Wood, Yoroi Musha, and Ryukyu.

Update on me:

I'm still using Jai, but I've been experiencing significant burnout lately. I'm trying to transfer my old ideas here and trying to update 200 of my bots on this account. Additionally, I'm working on fulfilling various requests. Because of this, I'm taking my time without a set schedule, and I handle everything at my own pace, whenever I find the time.

I'm not taking anymore requests tbh

Anything that was requested before September will be worked on…

Cause tbh I didn't really expected to be drowned with requests… especially for free

Don't ask when will I repost or publish something

I'll do it whenever I get to it.

I am busy irl and mental is doing backflips as its all over the place rn

So yeah..

TO FIND ME:
